steps.title: Find the median position
steps.content:
With $17$ restaurants, the median is the $9$th value in the ordered list:
$$
\frac{17+1}{2}=9
$$

steps.title: Use cumulative counts
steps.content:
The first three groups account for
$$
2+4+2=8
$$
restaurants, so the $9$th restaurant is in the next group, from $20$ to $25$ employees.

steps.title: Choose a possible median
steps.content: The only listed value in the $20$ to $25$ interval is $21$. The answer is D.
